description: Late letter in Judaeo-Arabic from Avraham Haman and Gavriel Hefez to Merkado Karo and Shimʿon Frances dated 35 from the counting of the Omer, ~Iyyar 5569 AM (1809 CE). The letter ט in the alphnumerical date at first glance appears to be a ז-zayn at first glance but is clearly the former given the shape of the upper penstroke. This letter appears in: Wagner, Linguistic Variety of Judaeo-Arabic in Letters from the Cairo Genizah, 24.
tags: Late JA, Gavriel Hefez, Haman & Hefez, 19th c, Avraham Haman, Karo y Frances
description_he: מכתב מאוחר בערבית-יהודית מאברהם המן וגבריאל חפץ למרקאדו קארו ושמעון פרנסס. מתוארך ל"ה לעומר, ~אייר תקס"ט (1809 לספירה).
